_note: ArtOps — Crystallized EarnedConstraints. This is the single canonical source. Root earned_constraints.json is deprecated.

entries.never_again: generating a variant without attaching the reference photo of the subject
entries.reason: brand_consistency scored 0 (unscored) when no reference photo was used at the MAKE step. A zero on brand_consistency alone causes total to drop below the 28/40 portfolio threshold. Observed in Chase session (Loop 1): total was 24/40, verdict LOOP.

evidence.root_cause: text-only generation, no reference photo attached, empty brand-profile.json

entries.tier_impact: This constraint moves the pack from Tier 1 (bootstrapped) toward Tier 2 (proven). First crystallized rule.

entries.never_again: creating an SVG with fixed width and height attributes on the root element for use inside DocFX
entries.reason: DocFX content columns have overflow:hidden. Fixed-width SVGs wider than the column are clipped to invisible. viewBox-only SVGs scale fluidly to any container width.

evidence.agent_scope: Maker — any agent writing SVG files for DocFX sites
evidence.root_cause: docs/images/artops-logo.svg shipped with width="256" height="256" in addition to viewBox, causing clipping in narrow DocFX columns. Corrected during TIER 2->3 sync 2026-06-12.

entries.enforcement: All SVG files intended for DocFX must use viewBox only. Remove width and height attributes from the <svg> root before writing. Apply max-width:100%; height:auto in CSS.
entries.tier_impact: Applies to all 8 SVGs under docs/images/. Verified compliant 2026-06-12 after fixing artops-logo.svg.

entries.never_again: relying only on the article img CSS selector for images in DocFX landing layout pages
entries.reason: layout: landing pages in DocFX do not wrap content in <article>. The article selector never fires for landing pages. Both .diagram-wrap/.diagram-img AND article img must be defined to cover all DocFX layout types.

evidence.agent_scope: Maker — any agent writing CSS for DocFX sites
evidence.verification: docs/artops-template/public/main.css contains both 'article img, article figure img, .content img' and '.diagram-wrap'/'.diagram-img' blocks. Verified compliant 2026-06-12.

entries.enforcement:
DocFX CSS must always include: (1) article img — for standard pages, (2) .diagram-wrap / .diagram-img — for landing layout pages. Use
for all diagram embeds.

entries.never_again: beginning a file-writing session for a project without first opening a system trail frame
entries.reason: The artops-docs-session-01 workstream produced 18 file edits across 3 loops with no trail frames until retroactive backfill. EC-010 mandates trail.append after every phase. The system frame (00-system.jsonl) is the cycle's contract — it must be written before the first tool call.
entries.enforcement: On every session start where file writes or tool calls will occur: (1) Assign cycle_id, (2) Write 00-system.jsonl with seed_intent and scope, (3) THEN begin executing. Backfill is permitted but is a constraint violation signal.
entries.tier_impact: Ratified as ARCH-NEW-002 in pmcro-framework. Repeated as FRAC-TRAIL-BACKFILL-001 during the 2026-06-12 TIER 2->3 sync session.
